ddls:
CREATE TABLE "investments" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment */,
  "investment_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment */,
  "initial_investment_date" TEXT /* Date of the initial investment */,
  "investment_type" TEXT /* Type of investment (e.g., equity, debt) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the investment */,
  "geography" TEXT /* Geographic location of the investment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the investment (e.g., active, exited) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the investment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funds" (
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund */,
  "fund_name" TEXT /* Name of the fund */,
  "fund_type" TEXT /* Type of fund (e.g., buyout, growth equity) */,
  "fund_size" TEXT /* Size of the fund */,
  "vintage_year" INTEGER /* Vintage year of the fund */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the fund (e.g., active, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_funds" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date of the investment */,
  "commitment_amount" TEXT /* Amount of capital committed by the fund */,
  "distribution_amount" TEXT /* Amount of capital distributed by the fund */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id", "fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "capital_commitments" (
  "capital_commitment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capital commitment */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment */,
  "capital_committed" TEXT /* Amount of capital committed */,
  "paid_in_capital" TEXT /* Amount of capital paid in */,
  "unfunded_commitment" TEXT /* Unfunded amount of capital commitment */,
  "commitment_date" TEXT /* Date of the capital commitment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capital_commitment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_capital_commitments_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "valuations" (
  "valuation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each valuation */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment */,
  "valuation_date" TEXT /* Date of the valuation */,
  "current_market_value" TEXT /* Current market value of the investment */,
  "capital_distributed" TEXT /* Amount of capital distributed */,
  "valuation_method" TEXT /* Method used for valuation (e.g., income approach, market approach) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("valuation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_valuations_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investors" (
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investor */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund */,
  "investor_name" TEXT /* Name of the investor */,
  "investor_type" TEXT /* Type of investor (e.g., limited partner, general partner) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investor_investments" (
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investor */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date of the investment */,
  "commitment_amount" TEXT /* Amount of capital committed by the investor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investor_id", "investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distributions" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investor */,
  "distribution_date" TEXT /* Date of the distribution */,
  "distribution_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the distribution */,
  "distribution_type" TEXT /* Type of distribution (e.g., cash, stock) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_distributions_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment */,
  "valuation_date" TEXT /* Date of the valuation */,
  "total_value" TEXT /* Total value of the investment */,
  "gain_since_inception" TEXT /* Gain since inception */,
  "net_irr" TEXT /* Net IRR */,
  "gross_irr" TEXT /* Gross IRR */,
  "cash_on_cash_return" TEXT /* Cash-on-cash return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_performance_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, investor) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_investments" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access to the investment (e.g., read, write) */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* Notification preferences for the user (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date of the import */,
  "import_file" TEXT /* Name of the import file */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the import (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., pitch book, due diligence report) */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date of the document */,
  "document_file" TEXT /* File containing the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_documents_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)
